exploration_notes: Searched both repos for all occurrences of 'StreamAggregatedResources'. Found 26 distinct call sites across 14 files. In envoy (C++): used as a method descriptor string for FindMethodByName() in proto_descriptors.cc (validation), grpc_mux_impl.cc (GrpcMuxImpl::updateMuxSource and GrpcMuxFactory::create), xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc (SotwGrpcMuxFactory::create), xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.h (GrpcMuxSotw::methodName), plus test files. In grpc-go: called as a gRPC method path string in adsStreamImpl.runner
